name: Broccoli-Cauliflower Bake
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Broccoli florets, cooked and drained
2 cups Cauliflower florets, cooked and drained
1 can (10 oz/284 ml) Condensed Cream of Broccoli Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Place vegetables in a 6-cup (1.5 L) baking dish.
2. In a small dish, combine soup, milk and half of the Parmesan. Pour over vegetables.
3. Combine margarine, bread crumbs and remaining Parmesan. Sprinkle on top of casserole.
4. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 25 minutes or until hot and bubbling.
